creator: magik@roorback.net
text:
After update gstreamer-plugins to 0.10.29,3 I can't build gstreamer-plugins-good.
This can be fixed by updating gstreamer-plugins-good port to 0.10.22

Fix: Apply patch against streamer-plugins, which update gstreamer-plugins-good to 0.10.22 release

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Update port tree to version from 28 Apr 2010 18:23:57
and try to build gstreamer-plugins-good
